Fix ZeroDivisionError in Options Pipeline\n429\t\n430\t**Priority:** 🔴 CRITICAL - Active production issue  \n431\t**Impact:** Eliminates primary failure mode, reduces restarts by 95%+  \n432\t**Effort:** 2-4 hours development + testing\n433\t\n434\t**Recommended Solution:**\n435\t```python\n436\tdef calculate_iv_with_validation(chunk):\n437\t    \"\"\"Calculate implied volatility with comprehensive input validation\"\"\"\n438\t    for idx, row in chunk.iterrows():\n439\t        t = row['T']  # Time to expiration\n440\t        F = row['F']  # Forward price  \n441\t        K = row['K']  # Strike price\n442\t        price = row['undiscounted_option_price']\n443\t        symbol = row.get('symbol', 'unknown')\n444\t        \n445\t        # Pre-calculation validation with detailed logging\n446\t        if t <= 0:\n447\t            logger.warning(f\"Invalid T={t} for symbol {symbol}, skipping calculation\")\n448\t            continue\n449\t        if F <= 0:\n450\t            logger.warning(f\"Invalid forward price F={F} for symbol {symbol}, skipping\")\n451\t            continue\n452\t        if K <= 0:\n453\t            logger.warning(f\"Invalid strike price K={K} for symbol {symbol}, skipping\")\n454\t            continue\n455\t        if price <= 0:\n456\t            logger.warning(f\"Invalid option price={price} for symbol {symbol}, skipping\")\n457\t            continue\n458\t        \n459\t        # Safe calculation with exception handling\n460\t        try:\n461\t            iv = py_vollib_vectorized.implied_volatility.vectorized_implied_volatility(\n462\t                price, F, K, t, flag\n463\t            )\n464\t            chunk.at[idx, 'IV'] = iv\n465\t        except (ZeroDivisionError, ValueError, CalculationError) as e:\n466\t            logger.error(f\"Calculation failed for symbol {symbol}: {e}\")\n467\t            # Set IV to NaN or sentinel value instead of crashing\n468\t            chunk.at[idx, 'IV'] = None\n469\t    return chunk\n470\t```\n471\t\n472\t**Deployment Steps:**\n473\t1. Update calculation code in options pipeline repository\n474\t2. Add comprehensive input validation before expensive calculations\n475\t3. Implement graceful error handling with detailed logging\n476\t4. Add monitoring for validation failures and success rates\n477\t5. Deploy to canary environment first (options-greeks-canary pod)\n478\t6. Monitor for ZeroDivisionError elimination for 7 days\n479\t7. Roll out to all pods after validation\n480\t\n481\t**Success Criteria:**\n482\t- ZeroDivisionError events: 0 for 7+ consecutive days\n483\t- Pod restart count: Stabilized (no increase)\n484\t- Validation warnings: Logged appropriately for invalid data rejection\n485\t- Processing throughput: Maintained or improved\n486\t\n487\t#### 2. Monitor Implementation Effectiveness\n488\t\n489\t**After implementing the fix:**\n490\t```bash\n491\t# Monitor for ZeroDivisionError elimination  \n492\tkubectl --server=http://traefik-iad-options:8001 logs -f -n options \\\n493\t  options-greeks-7cbcd5dff4-24p6f -c worker | grep -i \"zerodivision\"\n494\t\n495\t# Track pod restart reduction\n496\twatch -n 60 'kubectl --server=http://traefik-iad-options:8001 get pods -n options'\n497\t\n498\t# Monitor validation warnings\n499\tkubectl --server=http://traefik-iad-options:8001 logs -f -n options \\\n500\t  options-greeks-7cbcd5dff4-24p6f | grep \"Invalid.*for symbol\"\n501\t```\n502\t\n503\t### Medium-Term Actions 🟡 HIGH\n504\t\n505\t#### 3. Implement Data Quality Validation Layer\n506\t\n507\t**Priority:** 🟡 HIGH - Prevents invalid data from reaching calculations  \n508\t**Impact:** Systematic improvement in data quality and processing efficiency  \n509\t**Effort:** 1-2 days development\n510\t\n511\t**Recommended Architecture:**\n512\t```python\n513\tclass OptionsDataValidator:\n514\t    \"\"\"Validate options data before expensive calculations\"\"\"\n515\t    \n516\t    def __init__(self):\n517\t        self.logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)\n518\t        self.metrics = {\n519\t            'total_validations': 0,\n520\t            'failures': {\n521\t                't_zero': 0,\n522\t                'f_invalid': 0, \n523\t                'k_invalid': 0,\n524\t                'price_invalid': 0\n525\t            }\n526\t        }\n527\t    \n528\t    def validate_row(self, row):\n529\t        \"\"\"Validate a single options data row\"\"\"\n530\t        self.metrics['total_validations'] += 1\n531\t        \n532\t        checks = [\n533\t            (row['T'] > 0, 't_zero', f\"Invalid T={row['T']}\"),\n534\t            (row['F'] > 0, 'f_invalid', f\"Invalid F={row['F']}\"),\n535\t            (row['K'] > 0, 'k_invalid', f\"Invalid K={row['K']}\"),\n536\t            (row['undiscounted_option_price'] > 0, 'price_invalid', \n537\t             f\"Invalid price={row['undiscounted_option_price']}\")\n538\t        ]\n539\t        \n540\t        for valid, metric_key, error_msg in checks:\n541\t            if not valid:\n542\t                self.logger.warning(f\"Data validation failed: {error_msg} for symbol {row.get('symbol')}\")\n543\t                self.metrics['failures'][metric_key] += 1\n544\t                return False\n545\t        return True\n546\t    \n547\t    def filter_chunk(self, chunk):\n548\t        \"\"\"Filter out invalid rows from a chunk\"\"\"\n549\t        valid_rows = []\n550\t        for idx, row in chunk.iterrows():\n551\t            if self.validate_row(row):\n552\t                valid_rows.append(row)\n553\t        return pd.DataFrame(valid_rows)\n554\t    \n555\t    def get_metrics(self):\n556\t        \"\"\"Return validation metrics for monitoring\"\"\"\n557\t        return self.metrics\n558\t```\n559\t\n560\t**Integration Point:** Pre-calculation in the processing pipeline\n561\t\n562\t**Benefits:**\n563\t- Early rejection of invalid data (saves computation cost)\n564\t- Detailed metrics on data quality issues\n565\t- Improved observability for upstream data problems\n566\t- Prevents pod crashes from calculation errors\n567\t\n568\t#### 4. Add Telemetry for Data Quality\n569\t\n570\t**Priority:** 🟡 MEDIUM - Essential for monitoring and alerting  \n571\t**Impact:** Real-time visibility into system health and data quality\n572\t\n573\t**Prometheus Metrics:**\n574\t```python\n575\tfrom prometheus_client import Counter, Histogram, Gauge\n576\t\n577\toptions_metrics = {\n578\t    # Validation metrics\n579\t    'options_validation_failures_total': Counter(\n580\t        'options_validation_failures_total',\n581\t        'Total count of validation failures',\n582\t        ['reason']  # t_zero, f_invalid, k_invalid, price_invalid\n583\t    ),\n584\t    'options_validation_success_total': Counter(\n585\t        'options_validation_success_total',\n586\t        'Successful options data validations'\n587\t    ),\n588\t    \n589\t    # Calculation metrics  \n590\t    'options_calculation_success_total': Counter(\n591\t        'options_calculation_success_total',\n592\t        'Successful options calculations'\n593\t    ),\n594\t    'options_calculation_failures_total': Counter(\n595\t        'options_calculation_failures_total', \n596\t        'Failed options calculations',\n597\t        ['error_type']  # zerodivision, valueerror, etc.\n598\t    ),\n599\t    \n600\t    # Performance metrics\n601\t    'options_calculation_duration_seconds': Histogram(\n602\t        'options_calculation_duration_seconds',\n603\t        'Options calculation duration',\n604\t        buckets=[0.1, 0.5, 1.0, 2.0, 5.0, 10.0, 30.0]\n605\t    ),\n606\t    \n607\t    # Health indicators\n608\t    'options_pod_restarts_total': Gauge(\n609\t        'options_pod_restarts_total',\n610\t        'Total pod restarts',\n611\t        ['pod_name']\n612\t    ),\n613\t    'options_active_errors': Gauge(\n614\t        'options_active_errors',\n615\t        'Current number of active errors',\n616\t        ['severity']\n617\t    )\n618\t}\n619\t```\n620\t\n621\t**Monitoring Dashboard:** Grafana panels showing:\n622\t- Validation failure rate by reason\n623\t- Calculation success/failure rates  \n624\t- Processing latency distribution\n625\t- Pod restart correlation with validation spikes\n626\t- Data quality trend analysis\n627\t\n628\t### Long-Term Improvements 🟢 MEDIUM\n629\t\n630\t#### 5. Enhanced Observability\n631\t\n632\t**Priority:** 🟢 MEDIUM - Improves debugging and operational awareness  \n633\t**Impact:** Faster incident response, better system understanding\n634\t\n635\t**Structured Logging:**\n636\t```python\n637\timport json\n638\timport logging\n639\tfrom datetime import datetime\n640\t\n641\tclass StructuredLogger:\n642\t    def __init__(self, service_name):\n643\t        self.service_name = service_name\n644\t        \n645\t    def log_event(self, level, event_type, **kwargs):\n646\t        log_entry = {\n647\t            'timestamp': datetime.utcnow().isoformat(),\n648\t            'service': self.service_name,\n649\t            'level': level,\n650\t            'event': event_type,\n651\t            **kwargs\n652\t        }\n653\t        print(json.dumps(log_entry))\n654\t\n655\t# Usage\n656\tlogger = StructuredLogger('options-pipeline')\n657\tlogger.log_event(\n658\t    'ERROR', \n659\t    'calculation_failed',\n660\t    symbol='AAPL',\n661\t    error_type='ZeroDivisionError',\n662\t    t=0,\n663\t    f=150.5,\n664\t    k=145.0,\n665\t    pod_name='options-greeks-7cbcd5dff4-24p6f'\n666\t)\n667\t```\n668\t\n669\t**Distributed Tracing:** OpenTelemetry integration for request flow analysis across the options pipeline infrastructure.\n670\t\n671\t**Real-time Dashboards:** Grafana dashboards for system health visualization with alerts on critical metrics.\n672\t\n673\t#### 6. Implement Circuit Breaker Pattern\n674\t\n675\t**Priority:** 🟢 MEDIUM - Prevents cascade failures  \n676\t**Impact:** System resilience during error conditions\n677\t\n678\t**Architecture:**\n679\t```python\n680\tclass OptionsCalculationCircuitBreaker:\n681\t    \"\"\"Prevent cascade failures by stopping calculations after threshold\"\"\"\n682\t    \n683\t    def __init__(self, failure_threshold=10, timeout=300):\n684\t        self.failure_threshold = failure_threshold\n685\t        self.timeout = timeout  # 5 minutes\n686\t        self.failures = 0\n687\t        self.last_failure_time = None\n688\t        self.state = 'CLOSED'  # CLOSED, OPEN, HALF_OPEN\n689\t        \n690\t    def call(self, func, *args, **kwargs):\n691\t        \"\"\"Execute function with circuit breaker protection\"\"\"\n692\t        if self.state == 'OPEN':\n693\t            if time.time() - self.last_failure_time > self.timeout:\n694\t                self.state = 'HALF_OPEN'\n695\t                self.logger.info(\"Circuit breaker entering HALF_OPEN state\")\n696\t            else:\n697\t                raise CircuitBreakerOpenError(\n698\t                    f\"Circuit breaker is OPEN - too many recent failures. \"\n699\t                    f\"Retry in {int(self.timeout - (time.time() - self.last_failure_time))}s\"\n700\t                )\n701\t        \n702\t        try:\n703\t            result = func(*args, **kwargs)\n704\t            if self.state == 'HALF_OPEN':\n705\t                self.state = 'CLOSED'\n706\t                self.failures = 0\n707\t                self.logger.info(\"Circuit breaker returning to CLOSED state\")\n708\t            return result\n709\t        except ZeroDivisionError as e:\n710\t            self.failures += 1\n711\t            self.last_failure_time = time.time()\n712\t            self.logger.error(f\"Circuit breaker recorded failure: {self.failures}/{self.failure_threshold}\")\n713\t            if self.failures >= self.failure_threshold:\n714\t                self.state = 'OPEN'\n715\t                self.logger.critical(\"Circuit breaker opened due to excessive failures\")\n716\t            raise\n717\t```\n718\t\n719\t**Configuration:** 10 failures → 5-minute cooldown period → gradual recovery\n720\t\n721\t**Benefits:**\n722\t- Prevents system overload during error conditions\n723\t- Provides automatic recovery mechanism\n724\t- Improves overall system resilience\n725\t- Reduces operational burden during incidents\n726\t\n727\t#### 7. IBKR MCP Historical Pod Cleanup\n728\t\n729\t**Priority:** 🟢 LOW - Housekeeping only  \n730\t**Impact:** Minimal - cosmetic cleanup, no operational impact\n731\t\n732\t**Action:**\n733\t```bash\n734\t# Delete failed historical pods\n735\tkubectl --server=http://traefik-ardenone-cluster:8001 delete pod -n ibkr-mcp \\\n736\t Fix ZeroDivisionError in Options Pipeline\n\n**Priority:** 🔴 CRITICAL - Active production issue  \n**Impact:** Eliminates primary failure mode, reduces restarts by 95%+  \n**Effort:** 2-4 hours development + testing\n\n**Recommended Solution:**\n```python\ndef calculate_iv_with_validation(chunk):\n    \"\"\"Calculate implied volatility with comprehensive input validation\"\"\"\n    for idx, row in chunk.iterrows():\n        t = row['T']  # Time to expiration\n        F = row['F']  # Forward price  \n        K = row['K']  # Strike price\n        price = row['undiscounted_option_price']\n        symbol = row.get('symbol', 'unknown')\n        \n        # Pre-calculation validation with detailed logging\n        if t <= 0:\n            logger.warning(f\"Invalid T={t} for symbol {symbol}, skipping calculation\")\n            continue\n        if F <= 0:\n            logger.warning(f\"Invalid forward price F={F} for symbol {symbol}, skipping\")\n            continue\n        if K <= 0:\n            logger.warning(f\"Invalid strike price K={K} for symbol {symbol}, skipping\")\n            continue\n        if price <= 0:\n            logger.warning(f\"Invalid option price={price} for symbol {symbol}, skipping\")\n            continue\n        \n        # Safe calculation with exception handling\n        try:\n            iv = py_vollib_vectorized.implied_volatility.vectorized_implied_volatility(\n                price, F, K, t, flag\n            )\n            chunk.at[idx, 'IV'] = iv\n        except (ZeroDivisionError, ValueError, CalculationError) as e:\n            logger.error(f\"Calculation failed for symbol {symbol}: {e}\")\n            # Set IV to NaN or sentinel value instead of crashing\n            chunk.at[idx, 'IV'] = None\n    return chunk\n```\n\n**Deployment Steps:**\n1. Update calculation code in options pipeline repository\n2. Add comprehensive input validation before expensive calculations\n3. Implement graceful error handling with detailed logging\n4. Add monitoring for validation failures and success rates\n5. Deploy to canary environment first (options-greeks-canary pod)\n6. Monitor for ZeroDivisionError elimination for 7 days\n7. Roll out to all pods after validation\n\n**Success Criteria:**\n- ZeroDivisionError events: 0 for 7+ consecutive days\n- Pod restart count: Stabilized (no increase)\n- Validation warnings: Logged appropriately for invalid data rejection\n- Processing throughput: Maintained or improved\n\n#### 2. Monitor Implementation Effectiveness\n\n**After implementing the fix:**\n```bash\n# Monitor for ZeroDivisionError elimination  \nkubectl --server=http://traefik-iad-options:8001 logs -f -n options \\\n  options-greeks-7cbcd5dff4-24p6f -c worker | grep -i \"zerodivision\"\n\n# Track pod restart reduction\nwatch -n 60 'kubectl --server=http://traefik-iad-options:8001 get pods -n options'\n\n# Monitor validation warnings\nkubectl --server=http://traefik-iad-options:8001 logs -f -n options \\\n  options-greeks-7cbcd5dff4-24p6f | grep \"Invalid.*for symbol\"\n```\n\n### Medium-Term Actions 🟡 HIGH\n\n#### 3. Implement Data Quality Validation Layer\n\n**Priority:** 🟡 HIGH - Prevents invalid data from reaching calculations  \n**Impact:** Systematic improvement in data quality and processing efficiency  \n**Effort:** 1-2 days development\n\n**Recommended Architecture:**\n```python\nclass OptionsDataValidator:\n    \"\"\"Validate options data before expensive calculations\"\"\"\n    \n    def __init__(self):\n        self.logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)\n        self.metrics = {\n            'total_validations': 0,\n            'failures': {\n                't_zero': 0,\n                'f_invalid': 0, \n                'k_invalid': 0,\n                'price_invalid': 0\n            }\n        }\n    \n    def validate_row(self, row):\n        \"\"\"Validate a single options data row\"\"\"\n        self.metrics['total_validations'] += 1\n        \n        checks = [\n            (row['T'] > 0, 't_zero', f\"Invalid T={row['T']}\"),\n            (row['F'] > 0, 'f_invalid', f\"Invalid F={row['F']}\"),\n            (row['K'] > 0, 'k_invalid', f\"Invalid K={row['K']}\"),\n            (row['undiscounted_option_price'] > 0, 'price_invalid', \n             f\"Invalid price={row['undiscounted_option_price']}\")\n        ]\n        \n        for valid, metric_key, error_msg in checks:\n            if not valid:\n                self.logger.warning(f\"Data validation failed: {error_msg} for symbol {row.get('symbol')}\")\n                self.metrics['failures'][metric_key] += 1\n                return False\n        return True\n    \n    def filter_chunk(self, chunk):\n        \"\"\"Filter out invalid rows from a chunk\"\"\"\n        valid_rows = []\n        for idx, row in chunk.iterrows():\n            if self.validate_row(row):\n                valid_rows.append(row)\n        return pd.DataFrame(valid_rows)\n    \n    def get_metrics(self):\n        \"\"\"Return validation metrics for monitoring\"\"\"\n        return self.metrics\n```\n\n**Integration Point:** Pre-calculation in the processing pipeline\n\n**Benefits:**\n- Early rejection of invalid data (saves computation cost)\n- Detailed metrics on data quality issues\n- Improved observability for upstream data problems\n- Prevents pod crashes from calculation errors\n\n#### 4. Add Telemetry for Data Quality\n\n**Priority:** 🟡 MEDIUM - Essential for monitoring and alerting  \n**Impact:** Real-time visibility into system health and data quality\n\n**Prometheus Metrics:**\n```python\nfrom prometheus_client import Counter, Histogram, Gauge\n\noptions_metrics = {\n    # Validation metrics\n    'options_validation_failures_total': Counter(\n        'options_validation_failures_total',\n        'Total count of validation failures',\n        ['reason']  # t_zero, f_invalid, k_invalid, price_invalid\n    ),\n    'options_validation_success_total': Counter(\n        'options_validation_success_total',\n        'Successful options data validations'\n    ),\n    \n    # Calculation metrics  \n    'options_calculation_success_total': Counter(\n        'options_calculation_success_total',\n        'Successful options calculations'\n    ),\n    'options_calculation_failures_total': Counter(\n        'options_calculation_failures_total', \n        'Failed options calculations',\n        ['error_type']  # zerodivision, valueerror, etc.\n    ),\n    \n    # Performance metrics\n    'options_calculation_duration_seconds': Histogram(\n        'options_calculation_duration_seconds',\n        'Options calculation duration',\n        buckets=[0.1, 0.5, 1.0, 2.0, 5.0, 10.0, 30.0]\n    ),\n    \n    # Health indicators\n    'options_pod_restarts_total': Gauge(\n        'options_pod_restarts_total',\n        'Total pod restarts',\n        ['pod_name']\n    ),\n    'options_active_errors': Gauge(\n        'options_active_errors',\n        'Current number of active errors',\n        ['severity']\n    )\n}\n```\n\n**Monitoring Dashboard:** Grafana panels showing:\n- Validation failure rate by reason\n- Calculation success/failure rates  \n- Processing latency distribution\n- Pod restart correlation with validation spikes\n- Data quality trend analysis\n\n### Long-Term Improvements 🟢 MEDIUM\n\n#### 5. Enhanced Observability\n\n**Priority:** 🟢 MEDIUM - Improves debugging and operational awareness  \n**Impact:** Faster incident response, better system understanding\n\n**Structured Logging:**\n```python\nimport json\nimport logging\nfrom datetime import datetime\n\nclass StructuredLogger:\n    def __init__(self, service_name):\n        self.service_name = service_name\n        \n    def log_event(self, level, event_type, **kwargs):\n        log_entry = {\n            'timestamp': datetime.utcnow().isoformat(),\n            'service': self.service_name,\n            'level': level,\n            'event': event_type,\n            **kwargs\n        }\n        print(json.dumps(log_entry))\n\n# Usage\nlogger = StructuredLogger('options-pipeline')\nlogger.log_event(\n    'ERROR', \n    'calculation_failed',\n    symbol='AAPL',\n    error_type='ZeroDivisionError',\n    t=0,\n    f=150.5,\n    k=145.0,\n    pod_name='options-greeks-7cbcd5dff4-24p6f'\n)\n```\n\n**Distributed Tracing:** OpenTelemetry integration for request flow analysis across the options pipeline infrastructure.\n\n**Real-time Dashboards:** Grafana dashboards for system health visualization with alerts on critical metrics.\n\n#### 6. Implement Circuit Breaker Pattern\n\n**Priority:** 🟢 MEDIUM - Prevents cascade failures  \n**Impact:** System resilience during error conditions\n\n**Architecture:**\n```python\nclass OptionsCalculationCircuitBreaker:\n    \"\"\"Prevent cascade failures by stopping calculations after threshold\"\"\"\n    \n    def __init__(self, failure_threshold=10, timeout=300):\n        self.failure_threshold = failure_threshold\n        self.timeout = timeout  # 5 minutes\n        self.failures = 0\n        self.last_failure_time = None\n        self.state = 'CLOSED'  # CLOSED, OPEN, HALF_OPEN\n        \n    def call(self, func, *args, **kwargs):\n        \"\"\"Execute function with circuit breaker protection\"\"\"\n        if self.state == 'OPEN':\n            if time.time() - self.last_failure_time > self.timeout:\n                self.state = 'HALF_OPEN'\n                self.logger.info(\"Circuit breaker entering HALF_OPEN state\")\n            else:\n                raise CircuitBreakerOpenError(\n                    f\"Circuit breaker is OPEN - too many recent failures. \"\n                    f\"Retry in {int(self.timeout - (time.time() - self.last_failure_time))}s\"\n                )\n        \n        try:\n            result = func(*args, **kwargs)\n            if self.state == 'HALF_OPEN':\n                self.state = 'CLOSED'\n                self.failures = 0\n                self.logger.info(\"Circuit breaker returning to CLOSED state\")\n            return result\n        except ZeroDivisionError as e:\n            self.failures += 1\n            self.last_failure_time = time.time()\n            self.logger.error(f\"Circuit breaker recorded failure: {self.failures}/{self.failure_threshold}\")\n            if self.failures >= self.failure_threshold:\n                self.state = 'OPEN'\n                self.logger.critical(\"Circuit breaker opened due to excessive failures\")\n            raise\n```\n\n**Configuration:** 10 failures → 5-minute cooldown period → gradual recovery\n\n**Benefits:**\n- Prevents system overload during error conditions\n- Provides automatic recovery mechanism\n- Improves overall system resilience\n- Reduces operational burden during incidents\n\n#### 7. Needs Immediate Attention)\n- **IBKR MCP:** 10.0/10 (🟢 EXCELLENT - Operational Excellence)\n\n---\n\n## Recommendations\n\n### Immediate Actions Required 🔴 CRITICAL\n\n#### 1. Fix ZeroDivisionError in Options Pipeline\n\n**Priority:** 🔴 CRITICAL - Active production issue  \n**Impact:** Eliminates primary failure mode, reduces restarts by 95%+  \n**Effort:** 2-4 hours development + testing\n\n**Recommended Solution:**\n```python\ndef calculate_iv_with_validation(chunk):\n    \"\"\"Calculate implied volatility with comprehensive input validation\"\"\"\n    for idx, row in chunk.iterrows():\n        t = row['T']  # Time to expiration\n        F = row['F']  # Forward price  \n        K = row['K']  # Strike price\n        price = row['undiscounted_option_price']\n        symbol = row.get('symbol', 'unknown')\n        \n        # Pre-calculation validation with detailed logging\n        if t <= 0:\n            logger.warning(f\"Invalid T={t} for symbol {symbol}, skipping calculation\")\n            continue\n        if F <= 0:\n            logger.warning(f\"Invalid forward price F={F} for symbol {symbol}, skipping\")\n            continue\n        if K <= 0:\n            logger.warning(f\"Invalid strike price K={K} for symbol {symbol}, skipping\")\n            continue\n        if price <= 0:\n            logger.warning(f\"Invalid option price={price} for symbol {symbol}, skipping\")\n            continue\n        \n        # Safe calculation with exception handling\n        try:\n            iv = py_vollib_vectorized.implied_volatility.vectorized_implied_volatility(\n                price, F, K, t, flag\n            )\n            chunk.at[idx, 'IV'] = iv\n        except (ZeroDivisionError, ValueError, CalculationError) as e:\n            logger.error(f\"Calculation failed for symbol {symbol}: {e}\")\n            # Set IV to NaN or sentinel value instead of crashing\n            chunk.at[idx, 'IV'] = None\n    return chunk\n```\n\n**Deployment Steps:**\n1. Update calculation code in options pipeline repository\n2. Add comprehensive input validation before expensive calculations\n3. Implement graceful error handling with detailed logging\n4. Add monitoring for validation failures and success rates\n5. Deploy to canary environment first (options-greeks-canary pod)\n6. Monitor for ZeroDivisionError elimination for 7 days\n7. Roll out to all pods after validation\n\n**Success Criteria:**\n- ZeroDivisionError events: 0 for 7+ consecutive days\n- Pod restart count: Stabilized (no increase)\n- Validation warnings: Logged appropriately for invalid data rejection\n- Processing throughput: Maintained or improved\n\n#### 2. Monitor Implementation Effectiveness\n\n**After implementing the fix:**\n```bash\n# Monitor for ZeroDivisionError elimination  \nkubectl --server=http://traefik-iad-options:8001 logs -f -n options \\\n  options-greeks-7cbcd5dff4-24p6f -c worker | grep -i \"zerodivision\"\n\n# Track pod restart reduction\nwatch -n 60 'kubectl --server=http://traefik-iad-options:8001 get pods -n options'\n\n# Monitor validation warnings\nkubectl --server=http://traefik-iad-options:8001 logs -f -n options \\\n  options-greeks-7cbcd5dff4-24p6f | grep \"Invalid.*for symbol\"\n```\n\n### Medium-Term Actions 🟡 HIGH\n\n#### 3. Implement Data Quality Validation Layer\n\n**Priority:** 🟡 HIGH - Prevents invalid data from reaching calculations  \n**Impact:** Systematic improvement in data quality and processing efficiency  \n**Effort:** 1-2 days development\n\n**Recommended Architecture:**\n```python\nclass OptionsDataValidator:\n    \"\"\"Validate options data before expensive calculations\"\"\"\n    \n    def __init__(self):\n        self.logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)\n        self.metrics = {\n            'total_validations': 0,\n            'failures': {\n                't_zero': 0,\n                'f_invalid': 0, \n                'k_invalid': 0,\n                'price_invalid': 0\n            }\n        }\n    \n    def validate_row(self, row):\n        \"\"\"Validate a single options data row\"\"\"\n        self.metrics['total_validations'] += 1\n        \n        checks = [\n            (row['T'] > 0, 't_zero', f\"Invalid T={row['T']}\"),\n            (row['F'] > 0, 'f_invalid', f\"Invalid F={row['F']}\"),\n            (row['K'] > 0, 'k_invalid', f\"Invalid K={row['K']}\"),\n            (row['undiscounted_option_price'] > 0, 'price_invalid', \n             f\"Invalid price={row['undiscounted_option_price']}\")\n        ]\n        \n        for valid, metric_key, error_msg in checks:\n            if not valid:\n                self.logger.warning(f\"Data validation failed: {error_msg} for symbol {row.get('symbol')}\")\n                self.metrics['failures'][metric_key] += 1\n                return False\n        return True\n    \n    def filter_chunk(self, chunk):\n        \"\"\"Filter out invalid rows from a chunk\"\"\"\n        valid_rows = []\n        for idx, row in chunk.iterrows():\n            if self.validate_row(row):\n                valid_rows.append(row)\n        return pd.DataFrame(valid_rows)\n    \n    def get_metrics(self):\n        \"\"\"Return validation metrics for monitoring\"\"\"\n        return self.metrics\n```\n\n**Integration Point:** Pre-calculation in the processing pipeline\n\n**Benefits:**\n- Early rejection of invalid data (saves computation cost)\n- Detailed metrics on data quality issues\n- Improved observability for upstream data problems\n- Prevents pod crashes from calculation errors\n\n#### 4. Add Telemetry for Data Quality\n\n**Priority:** 🟡 MEDIUM - Essential for monitoring and alerting  \n**Impact:** Real-time visibility into system health and data quality\n\n**Prometheus Metrics:**\n```python\nfrom prometheus_client import Counter, Histogram, Gauge\n\noptions_metrics = {\n    # Validation metrics\n    'options_validation_failures_total': Counter(\n        'options_validation_failures_total',\n        'Total count of validation failures',\n        ['reason']  # t_zero, f_invalid, k_invalid, price_invalid\n    ),\n    'options_validation_success_total': Counter(\n        'options_validation_success_total',\n        'Successful options data validations'\n    ),\n    \n    # Calculation metrics  \n    'options_calculation_success_total': Counter(\n        'options_calculation_success_total',\n        'Successful options calculations'\n    ),\n    'options_calculation_failures_total': Counter(\n        'options_calculation_failures_total', \n        'Failed options calculations',\n        ['error_type']  # zerodivision, valueerror, etc.\n    ),\n    \n    # Performance metrics\n    'options_calculation_duration_seconds': Histogram(\n        'options_calculation_duration_seconds',\n        'Options calculation duration',\n        buckets=[0.1, 0.5, 1.0, 2.0, 5.0, 10.0, 30.0]\n    ),\n    \n    # Health indicators\n    'options_pod_restarts_total': Gauge(\n        'options_pod_restarts_total',\n        'Total pod restarts',\n        ['pod_name']\n    ),\n    'options_active_errors': Gauge(\n        'options_active_errors',\n        'Current number of active errors',\n        ['severity']\n    )\n}\n```\n\n**Monitoring Dashboard:** Grafana panels showing:\n- Validation failure rate by reason\n- Calculation success/failure rates  \n- Processing latency distribution\n- Pod restart correlation with validation spikes\n- Data quality trend analysis\n\n### Long-Term Improvements 🟢 MEDIUM\n\n#### 5. Enhanced Observability\n\n**Priority:** 🟢 MEDIUM - Improves debugging and operational awareness  \n**Impact:** Faster incident response, better system understanding\n\n**Structured Logging:**\n```python\nimport json\nimport logging\nfrom datetime import datetime\n\nclass StructuredLogger:\n    def __init__(self, service_name):\n        self.service_name = service_name\n        \n    def log_event(self, level, event_type, **kwargs):\n        log_entry = {\n            'timestamp': datetime.utcnow().isoformat(),\n            'service': self.service_name,\n            'level': level,\n            'event': event_type,\n            **kwargs\n        }\n        print(json.dumps(log_entry))\n\n# Usage\nlogger = StructuredLogger('options-pipeline')\nlogger.log_event(\n    'ERROR', \n    'calculation_failed',\n    symbol='AAPL',\n    error_type='ZeroDivisionError',\n    t=0,\n    f=150.5,\n    k=145.0,\n    pod_name='options-greeks-7cbcd5dff4-24p6f'\n)\n```\n\n**Distributed Tracing:** OpenTelemetry integration for request flow analysis across the options pipeline infrastructure.\n\n**Real-time Dashboards:** Grafana dashboards for system health visualization with alerts on critical metrics.\n\n#### 6. Implement Circuit Breaker Pattern\n\n**Priority:** 🟢 MEDIUM - Prevents cascade failures  \n**Impact:** System resilience during error conditions\n\n**Architecture:**\n```python\nclass OptionsCalculationCircuitBreaker:\n    \"\"\"Prevent cascade failures by stopping calculations after threshold\"\"\"\n    \n    def __init__(self, failure_threshold=10, timeout=300):\n        self.failure_threshold = failure_threshold\n        self.timeout = timeout  # 5 minutes\n        self.failures = 0\n        self.last_failure_time = None\n        self.state = 'CLOSED'  # CLOSED, OPEN, HALF_OPEN\n        \n    def call(self, func, *args, **kwargs):\n        \"\"\"Execute function with circuit breaker protection\"\"\"\n        if self.state == 'OPEN':\n            if time.time() - self.last_failure_time > self.timeout:\n                self.state = 'HALF_OPEN'\n                self.logger.info(\"Circuit breaker entering HALF_OPEN state\")\n            else:\n                raise CircuitBreakerOpenError(\n                    f\"Circuit breaker is OPEN - too many recent failures. \"\n                    f\"Retry in {int(self.timeout - (time.time() - self.last_failure_time))}s\"\n                )\n        \n        try:\n            result = func(*args, **kwargs)\n            if self.state == 'HALF_OPEN':\n                self.state = 'CLOSED'\n                self.failures = 0\n                self.logger.info(\"Circuit breaker returning to CLOSED state\")\n            return result\n        except ZeroDivisionError as e:\n            self.failures += 1\n            self.last_failure_time = time.time()\n            self.logger.error(f\"Circuit breaker recorded failure: {self.failures}/{self.failure_threshold}\")\n            if self.failures >= self.failure_threshold:\n                self.state = 'OPEN'\n                self.logger.critical(\"Circuit breaker opened due to excessive failures\")\n            raise\n```\n\n**Configuration:** 10 failures → 5-minute cooldown period → gradual recovery\n\n**Benefits:**\n- Prevents system overload during error conditions\n- Provides automatic recovery mechanism\n- Improves overall system resilience\n- Reduces operational burden during incidents\n\n#### 7. IBKR MCP Historical Pod Cleanup\n\n**Priority:** 🟢 LOW - Housekeeping only  \n**Impact:** Minimal - cosmetic cleanup, no operational impact\n\n**Action:**\n```bash\n# Delete failed historical pods\nkubectl --server=http://traefik-ardenone-cluster:8001 delete pod -n ibkr-mcp \\\n  ibkr-mcp-server-7d78d47dbb-898mv \\\n  ibkr-mcp-server-7dd7c9c9bc-6cn57\n```\n\n**Impact:** Minimal - cosmetic cleanup, no operational benefit\n\n---\n\n## Conclusions\n\n### Overall System Assessment\n\n**Options Pipeline:** 🔴 **CRITICAL - Requires Immediate Code Fixes**\n- **Active Issue:** ZeroDivisionError Fix ZeroDivisionError in Options Pipeline\n\n**Priority:** 🔴 CRITICAL - Active production issue  \n**Impact:** Eliminates primary failure mode, reduces restarts by 95%+  \n**Effort:** 2-4 hours development + testing\n\n**Recommended Solution:**\n```python\ndef calculate_iv_with_validation(chunk):\n    \"\"\"Calculate implied volatility with comprehensive input validation\"\"\"\n    for idx, row in chunk.iterrows():\n        t = row['T']  # Time to expiration\n        F = row['F']  # Forward price  \n        K = row['K']  # Strike price\n        price = row['undiscounted_option_price']\n        symbol = row.get('symbol', 'unknown')\n        \n        # Pre-calculation validation with detailed logging\n        if t <= 0:\n            logger.warning(f\"Invalid T={t} for symbol {symbol}, skipping calculation\")\n            continue\n        if F <= 0:\n            logger.warning(f\"Invalid forward price F={F} for symbol {symbol}, skipping\")\n            continue\n        if K <= 0:\n            logger.warning(f\"Invalid strike price K={K} for symbol {symbol}, skipping\")\n            continue\n        if price <= 0:\n            logger.warning(f\"Invalid option price={price} for symbol {symbol}, skipping\")\n            continue\n        \n        # Safe calculation with exception handling\n        try:\n            iv = py_vollib_vectorized.implied_volatility.vectorized_implied_volatility(\n                price, F, K, t, flag\n            )\n            chunk.at[idx, 'IV'] = iv\n        except (ZeroDivisionError, ValueError, CalculationError) as e:\n            logger.error(f\"Calculation failed for symbol {symbol}: {e}\")\n            # Set IV to NaN or sentinel value instead of crashing\n            chunk.at[idx, 'IV'] = None\n    return chunk\n```\n\n**Deployment Steps:**\n1. Update calculation code in options pipeline repository\n2. Add comprehensive input validation before expensive calculations\n3. Implement graceful error handling with detailed logging\n4. Add monitoring for validation failures and success rates\n5. Deploy to canary environment first (options-greeks-canary pod)\n6. Monitor for ZeroDivisionError elimination for 7 days\n7. Roll out to all pods after validation\n\n**Success Criteria:**\n- ZeroDivisionError events: 0 for 7+ consecutive days\n- Pod restart count: Stabilized (no increase)\n- Validation warnings: Logged appropriately for invalid data rejection\n- Processing throughput: Maintained or improved\n\n#### 2. Monitor Implementation Effectiveness\n\n**After implementing the fix:**\n```bash\n# Monitor for ZeroDivisionError elimination  \nkubectl --server=http://traefik-iad-options:8001 logs -f -n options \\\n  options-greeks-7cbcd5dff4-24p6f -c worker | grep -i \"zerodivision\"\n\n# Track pod restart reduction\nwatch -n 60 'kubectl --server=http://traefik-iad-options:8001 get pods -n options'\n\n# Monitor validation warnings\nkubectl --server=http://traefik-iad-options:8001 logs -f -n options \\\n  options-greeks-7cbcd5dff4-24p6f | grep \"Invalid.*for symbol\"\n```\n\n### Medium-Term Actions 🟡 HIGH\n\n#### 3. Implement Data Quality Validation Layer\n\n**Priority:** 🟡 HIGH - Prevents invalid data from reaching calculations  \n**Impact:** Systematic improvement in data quality and processing efficiency  \n**Effort:** 1-2 days development\n\n**Recommended Architecture:**\n```python\nclass OptionsDataValidator:\n    \"\"\"Validate options data before expensive calculations\"\"\"\n    \n    def __init__(self):\n        self.logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)\n        self.metrics = {\n            'total_validations': 0,\n            'failures': {\n                't_zero': 0,\n                'f_invalid': 0, \n                'k_invalid': 0,\n                'price_invalid': 0\n            }\n        }\n    \n    def validate_row(self, row):\n        \"\"\"Validate a single options data row\"\"\"\n        self.metrics['total_validations'] += 1\n        \n        checks = [\n            (row['T'] > 0, 't_zero', f\"Invalid T={row['T']}\"),\n            (row['F'] > 0, 'f_invalid', f\"Invalid F={row['F']}\"),\n            (row['K'] > 0, 'k_invalid', f\"Invalid K={row['K']}\"),\n            (row['undiscounted_option_price'] > 0, 'price_invalid', \n             f\"Invalid price={row['undiscounted_option_price']}\")\n        ]\n        \n        for valid, metric_key, error_msg in checks:\n            if not valid:\n                self.logger.warning(f\"Data validation failed: {error_msg} for symbol {row.get('symbol')}\")\n                self.metrics['failures'][metric_key] += 1\n                return False\n        return True\n    \n    def filter_chunk(self, chunk):\n        \"\"\"Filter out invalid rows from a chunk\"\"\"\n        valid_rows = []\n        for idx, row in chunk.iterrows():\n            if self.validate_row(row):\n                valid_rows.append(row)\n        return pd.DataFrame(valid_rows)\n    \n    def get_metrics(self):\n        \"\"\"Return validation metrics for monitoring\"\"\"\n        return self.metrics\n```\n\n**Integration Point:** Pre-calculation in the processing pipeline\n\n**Benefits:**\n- Early rejection of invalid data (saves computation cost)\n- Detailed metrics on data quality issues\n- Improved observability for upstream data problems\n- Prevents pod crashes from calculation errors\n\n#### 4. Add Telemetry for Data Quality\n\n**Priority:** 🟡 MEDIUM - Essential for monitoring and alerting  \n**Impact:** Real-time visibility into system health and data quality\n\n**Prometheus Metrics:**\n```python\nfrom prometheus_client import Counter, Histogram, Gauge\n\noptions_metrics = {\n    # Validation metrics\n    'options_validation_failures_total': Counter(\n        'options_validation_failures_total',\n        'Total count of validation failures',\n        ['reason']  # t_zero, f_invalid, k_invalid, price_invalid\n    ),\n    'options_validation_success_total': Counter(\n        'options_validation_success_total',\n        'Successful options data validations'\n    ),\n    \n    # Calculation metrics  \n    'options_calculation_success_total': Counter(\n        'options_calculation_success_total',\n        'Successful options calculations'\n    ),\n    'options_calculation_failures_total': Counter(\n        'options_calculation_failures_total', \n        'Failed options calculations',\n        ['error_type']  # zerodivision, valueerror, etc.\n    ),\n    \n    # Performance metrics\n    'options_calculation_duration_seconds': Histogram(\n        'options_calculation_duration_seconds',\n        'Options calculation duration',\n        buckets=[0.1, 0.5, 1.0, 2.0, 5.0, 10.0, 30.0]\n    ),\n    \n    # Health indicators\n    'options_pod_restarts_total': Gauge(\n        'options_pod_restarts_total',\n        'Total pod restarts',\n        ['pod_name']\n    ),\n    'options_active_errors': Gauge(\n        'options_active_errors',\n        'Current number of active errors',\n        ['severity']\n    )\n}\n```\n\n**Monitoring Dashboard:** Grafana panels showing:\n- Validation failure rate by reason\n- Calculation success/failure rates  \n- Processing latency distribution\n- Pod restart correlation with validation spikes\n- Data quality trend analysis\n\n### Long-Term Improvements 🟢 MEDIUM\n\n#### 5. Implement Circuit Breaker Pattern\n\n**Priority:** 🟢 MEDIUM - Prevents cascade failures  \n**Impact:** System resilience during error conditions\n\n**Architecture:**\n```python\nclass OptionsCalculationCircuitBreaker:\n    \"\"\"Prevent cascade failures by stopping calculations after threshold\"\"\"\n    \n    def __init__(self, failure_threshold=10, timeout=300):\n        self.failure_threshold = failure_threshold\n        self.timeout = timeout  # 5 minutes\n        self.failures = 0\n        self.last_failure_time = None\n        self.state = 'CLOSED'  # CLOSED, OPEN, HALF_OPEN\n        \n    def call(self, func, *args, **kwargs):\n        \"\"\"Execute function with circuit breaker protection\"\"\"\n        if self.state == 'OPEN':\n            if time.time() - self.last_failure_time > self.timeout:\n                self.state = 'HALF_OPEN'\n                self.logger.info(\"Circuit breaker entering HALF_OPEN state\")\n            else:\n                raise CircuitBreakerOpenError(\n                    f\"Circuit breaker is OPEN - too many recent failures. \"\n                    f\"Retry in {int(self.timeout - (time.time() - self.last_failure_time))}s\"\n                )\n        \n        try:\n            result = func(*args, **kwargs)\n            if self.state == 'HALF_OPEN':\n                self.state = 'CLOSED'\n                self.failures = 0\n                self.logger.info(\"Circuit breaker returning to CLOSED state\")\n            return result\n        except ZeroDivisionError as e:\n            self.failures += 1\n            self.last_failure_time = time.time()\n            self.logger.error(f\"Circuit breaker recorded failure: {self.failures}/{self.failure_threshold}\")\n            if self.failures >= self.failure_threshold:\n                self.state = 'OPEN'\n                self.logger.critical(\"Circuit breaker opened due to excessive failures\")\n            raise\n```\n\n**Configuration:** 10 failures → 5-minute cooldown period → gradual recovery\n\n**Benefits:**\n- Prevents system overload during error conditions\n- Provides automatic recovery mechanism\n- Improves overall system resilience\n- Reduces operational burden during incidents\n\n#### 7.
